ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the race */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the race */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the race in meters */,
  "course_map" TEXT /* URL or path to the course map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES race_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Cat 1, Cat 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_level" TEXT /* Level of the category (e.g., Professional, Amateur) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the category (e.g., Under 23, Open) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "primary_discipline" TEXT /* Primary discipline of the athlete (e.g., Road, Time Trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position in the category */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the athlete */,
  "lap_1_time" TEXT /* Lap 1 time of the athlete */,
  "carried_points" TEXT /* Points carried over from previous races */,
  "scored_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the athlete in km/h */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Power output of the athlete in watts */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate of the athlete in bpm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_system" (
  "scoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position in the race */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the position */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Bonus points for special achievements */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Penalty points for infractions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scoring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "category_rules" TEXT /* Category-specific rules and regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_categories_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete left the team */,
  "leave_reason" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type (e.g., Time Trial, Road Race) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "typical_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the race type (e.g., 1 hour, 3 hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the race takes place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the race takes place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the race takes place */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the location */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain (e.g., Flat, Hilly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Average Speed, Elevation Gain) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., km/h, meters) */,
  "weather_data" TEXT /* Weather data during the race */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Race conditions (e.g., Windy, Wet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_analytics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Average Speed, Power Output) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., km/h, watts) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurement */,
  "training_load" REAL /* Training load for the athlete */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Recovery time for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Race Organizer, Team Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
